71.reason: [If p->lchild is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault because the function tries to access p->lchild->lchild without checking for NULL]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If p->lchild is NULL, this will cause a segmentation fault because print dereferences a NULL pointer. The function should check for NULL before recursing.]
